predictedBugs: hasDevflowDir() uses require('node:fs') which can throw in strict ESM contexts — should use async fs or import
review-pr path in executeFirstCommand resolves to src/cli/review-pr.js from commands/ quickstart context, was initially wrong and needed ../cli/ prefix
showTextGuide has two parallel logic branches (new vs existing without Devflow) that produce identical output — redundant but not harmful
edgeCases: Empty directory with no package.json, no tsconfig.json, no .git -> correctly detected as 'new' project
parallel Promise.all in detectProjectState — if one fileExists call throws, all fail. Safe because fileExists catches errors internally
Interactive mode: selectOption returns null on user cancellation, but @clack/prompts wrapper calls process.exit(0) before return — wizard never sees null
